name: blueink
description: Manage Blueink envelopes, templates, signers, and completed bundle files from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Blueink connects Codex to secure, signer-friendly eSignature tools through the Blueink remote MCP server so you can search envelopes, inspect signer status, list templates, create envelopes, and retrieve completed bundle files.
defaultPrompt: Find Blueink envelopes waiting on signatures.
Search Blueink envelopes for a customer.
Create a test Blueink envelope from a template.
